# seerr_media_item (Data Source)

Look up a single Seerr media record by ID via `GET /api/v1/media/{id}`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_media_item" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The Seerr-internal media ID.

### Read-Only

- `media_type` (String) The media type (`movie` or `tv`).
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body from the API.
- `status` (Number) The media availability status.
- `status_4k` (Number) The 4K media availability status.
- `tmdb_id` (Number) The TMDB ID of the media.
- `tvdb_id` (Number) The TVDB ID of the media, when present.
